title: The Girl Who Escaped: The Kara Robinson Story
original_title: The Girl Who Escaped: The Kara Robinson Story
overview: Based on a true story. 15-year-old Kara Robinson was kidnapped, assaulted and held captive for 18 hours. With her survival instincts kicking in, she plots a daring escape from the serial killer and leads police to his apartment.
